overnight_summary: Normal posture is active, so the desk is running on its standard MLB underwriting rules. No promoted champion is recorded yet, so the desk is leaning on the current fallback model. Latest promotion review stayed put: Promotion rejected for `gam_spline`. The research backtest marked the candidate ineligible before promotion review. `gam_spline` is not in the core-supported theory lane, so it cannot auto-promote as champion. A separate full validation-contract review has not been recorded yet, so champion promotion is blocked. Mean ECE 0.1640 exceeded the incumbent-plus-tolerance guardrail of 0.1263 + 0.0100. Bet count 0 fell short of the minimum 10.. Tonight's MLB slate has 12 games, with 4 bets and 8 passs.

glm_ridge.headline: Pregame ridge logistic regression driven by starting pitcher, bullpen, lineup, park, weather, and scheduling context.
glm_ridge.trust_note: Linear pregame model anchored by starting pitching, bullpen quality, lineup strength, park effects, and rest-travel context. It is only as good as the pregame starter and lineup view.

glm_elastic_net.headline: Pregame elastic-net logistic regression driven by starting pitcher, bullpen, lineup, park, weather, and schedule context.
glm_elastic_net.trust_note: Elastic-net pregame model using the MLB feature map with extra shrinkage on overlapping starter, bullpen, lineup, park, and weather signals.

theory_trace.note: Core-supported penalized GLM lane; not lasso credibility.

glm_lasso.headline: Pregame lasso logistic regression driven by starting pitcher, bullpen, lineup, park, weather, and schedule context.
glm_lasso.trust_note: Lasso pregame model using the MLB feature map with stronger pruning on overlapping starter, bullpen, lineup, park, and weather signals.

theory_trace.note: Core-supported penalized GLM lane with sparsity-focused review.

glm_vanilla.headline: Unpenalized logistic challenger built to test whether shrinkage is muting profit signal.
glm_vanilla.trust_note: Unpenalized logistic challenger. Useful when you want to know whether shrinkage is suppressing a real betting edge.

ensemble.headline: Default forecast that blends the live model stack into one probability.
ensemble.trust_note: All models combined. Best default pick. Can share the same blind spot.

glm_lasso_market_credibility.headline: 6 active inputs from the current MLB feature map.
glm_lasso_market_credibility.trust_note: Built on that model's own rule set. Good for a second opinion. Watch for large gaps versus the ensemble.

theory_trace.note: Holmes/Casotto lasso-credibility lane; core-supported only when market complement columns are populated and documented.

glm_lasso_prior_credibility.headline: 6 active inputs from the current MLB feature map.
glm_lasso_prior_credibility.trust_note: Built on that model's own rule set. Good for a second opinion. Watch for large gaps versus the ensemble.

theory_trace.note: Holmes/Casotto lasso-credibility lane; proxy priors remain experimental until a real prior complement ledger is populated.
